form.formComment: Useful gelding. Freshened for 33 days. Last start to post a big 5 len win. Huntingdon on March 11 over 3200m defeating Cluain Chormaic carrying 72.5kg at $1.90 in a hurdle. Race before finished ninth of 12 starters at Kempton Park in the G2 Dovecote Novices' Hurdle on February 21 over 3200m, 32 len behind Klub De Reve carrying 72kg at $41. Turned in a better effort last time when he saluted in a maiden hurdle (3200m) at Huntingdon by 5 lengths.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Severely hampered by the faller at the first hurdle.

form.formComment: Returns from the paddock today. Finished off last campaign 4 of 7 starters at Kelso December 29 over 4500m, 31 len behind Country Code carrying 73kg at $5. Previous preparation first-up won by 1.0 len this track October 11 over 3250m defeating At Vimeiro carrying 71kg at $1.80. Can measure up again.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up in the past. Resuming ran last in a small field at Ayr on February 23 over 3200m, on slow going 15 len behind Jardin De Tunis with 67.5kg at $21. Second run from a spell finished sixth of 13 runners at this track on March 25 over 4000m, on slow going 50 len behind Maiori carrying 68.5kg at $10. Certainly worth including.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. First-up after two months finished sixth of 9 runners at Carlisle on March 22 over 3400m, 33 len behind Rocking Man carrying 71kg at $126. Previously second-up finished tenth of 15 runners at Newcastle All Weather on January 15 over 3400m, 51 len behind Ronnie Russet with 70kg at $41. Others make more appeal.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up finished eighth of 9 starters at Kelso on February 13 over 3200m, on a wet track; 49 len behind Thelastmanfrompenr carrying 71kg at $151. Second run from a spell pulled up at this track on March 25 over 4000m. Will be tested. Can redeem himself and is among the chances.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 39 days. First-up after two months finished second of 10 starters at Haydock Park on March 5 over 3100m, 7 len behind Turbocharged with 69.5kg at $9.50. Previously second-up ran on from midfield; finished sixth of 15 starters at Wetherby on December 27 over 3200m, on slow going 6 len behind A Likeable Rogue carrying 71kg at $34. Can pose a serious challenge.

form.formComment: Resumes off a 57 day letup. Last outing came from midfield; finished fifth in a small field at Musselburgh on February 15 over 4100m, on slow going 28 len behind Didntgotwenty with 65kg at $5.50. The run before finished fifth of 8 runners at Wetherby on December 26 over 3900m, slow track; 15 len behind Wolfburg carrying 63kg at $4.50. Others look to be going better at this stage.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. Last start pulled up at Wetherby on March 27 over 3200m. Needs to regain punters' trust.
